basic_details.job_title: NIT Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Delhi. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Mathematics, Applied Mathematics, or a relevant discipline, along with a Ph.D. in the relevant area.
qualification.details: B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Mathematics, Applied Mathematics, or a relevant discipline. Ph.D. in the relevant area.

salary_details.details: Rs. 80000/- per month (Ph.D. awarded) or Rs. 70000/- per month (Ph.D. thesis submitted)

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Delhi Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the NIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the NIT Delhi recruitment is Assistant Professor. This is a contractual position for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Assistant Professor post at NIT Delhi as per the latest notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Assistant Professor position at NIT Delhi is scheduled for 23 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Mathematics, Applied Mathematics, or a relevant discipline, along with a Ph.D. in the relevant area.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is between Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 80,000 per month, depending on whether the Ph.D. is awarded or the thesis has been submitted.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the NIT Delhi Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by an Interview. Candidates must clear both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the NIT Delhi office. Specific details regarding the exact address and timing should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).
